title: Now Hiring Store Manager at MedPlus

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at MedPlus
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, MedPlus in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About MedPlus:
MedPlus is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MedPlus!
